== Notes for [[Item:Q87524|Q87524]] ==

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Octavia_(gens)

http://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kategorie:Octavier

http://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Octavius

--------------------

municipal magistrate of Velitrae

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=elacey1&id=I41894

•ID: I41894 •Name: '''Caius Municipal magistrate of Velitrae OCTAVIUS III''' •Sex: M •Change Date: 19 NOV 2003 at 06:56:07

*Father: Caius OCTAVIUS II

*Marriage 1 Spouse Unknown Children
*1. Caius Senator-Praetor and Governor of Macedonia OCTAVIUS IV

--------------------

Borgare i Rom.
--------------------
Municipal magistrate of Velitrae.

Borgare i Rom

He was a Roman Citizen.

He was a Roman Citizen.


wtf 4:565

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
